name: gavl
description: Gavl — a decentralized peer-to-peer Bitcoin bull/bear market (matched) on a Proof-of-Space-Time cooldown ledger, networked over Reticulum.

scripts.daemon:hash: cross-env GAVL_VDF=hash GAVL_SPACE=standin GAVL_ORACLE_PUBLISH=1 node src/server.ts
scripts.daemon:fresh: cross-env GAVL_VDF=hash GAVL_SPACE=standin GAVL_ORACLE_PUBLISH=1 GAVL_PERSIST=off node src/server.ts
scripts.test:fast: node --test test/intent-match.test.ts test/intent-fold.test.ts test/intent-gossip.test.ts test/consensus.test.ts test/consensus-gossip.test.ts test/ledger.test.ts test/post-cooldown.test.ts test/sync.test.ts test/custody-threshold.test.ts test/custody-bridge.test.ts
